entries.label: IMPORTANT: This app cannot be used for: Lift Stations, Backflow Devices, Fire Hydrants, Valves, Meters or Sampling. Use the appropriate app for these assets/activities.
Design Note: This page is used when AssetAppType = "General" in the LMH_AssetList_All reference dataset.
Other Issues (Select None or all that apply)
Any additional photos can be logged on the last screen
Is Follow Up Action Other Than Continued Routine Inspection/Maintenance Needed?
Any additional photos can be logged on the last screen
Take enough photos from different angles as needed to demonstrate the before & after condition as well as any details associated with damage or follow up actions.
